title: Vibrant Leather Dog Lead For Puppy, Dogs in 3 Sizes - For Small, Medium & Large Pet Bright Colour Leash (Green, Large (120cm x 2cm))
features: Beautiful PU Leather Dog Leads for any size dog. These Premium Quality Dog Leads are available in 3 sizes and in 16 vibrant colours
Small size measures 120cm x 1.5cm - Ideal for smaller dog breeds such as Yorkshire Terrier, Chihuahua, Jack Russell, Mini Dachshund, Maltese, Puppies - weight limit of 15kg
Large size measures 120cm x 2cm - Ideal for medium sized breeds such as Pug, Boston Terrier, Beagle, Cocker Spaniel, Border Collie, Springer Spaniel & similar size dogs - Weight limit of 20kg
Extra Large size measures 120cm x 2.5cm - Ideal for large / heavy size dogs - 60kg
Made with a Durable Metal Hook
